Functions and data structures for managing voice dictation sessions and handling voice transcriptions.


## Files
- **[transcription.c](transcription.c.md)**: Functions for validating and iterating over transcription sentences and words in voice data.
- **[transcription.h](transcription.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for validating and manipulating serialized voice transcriptions.
- **[voice.c](voice.c.md)**: Manages voice dictation sessions, including starting, stopping, and handling session results.
- **[voice.h](voice.h.md)**: Defines interfaces and functions for managing voice dictation sessions and handling voice control events.
